info.title: Akta.pro API
info.description:
Akta provides APIs for company intelligence and news monitoring:

1. **News** – Enriched news articles with AI summaries, sentiment, event tags, industry classifications, and company mention resolution.
2. **Company Enrichment** – Structured company data including firmographics, funding, headcount, and financials.
3. **Company Search** – Free endpoint to resolve company names, domains, or UUIDs.
4. **Product Reviews** – G2 product reviews with ratings and review content.
5. **Employee Reviews** – Employee sentiment data with workplace ratings.

**Authentication:** All endpoints require an API key in the `x-api-key` HTTP header.

xApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
xApiKeyAuth.description: API key obtained from your Akta account.

url.description: Canonical URL of the original article.

news_score.description: Relevance and quality score between 0.0 and 1.0.

full_text.description: Complete body text of the article.

countries.description: Array of ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes.

types.description: News types associated with the article.

is_primary.description: True if this is the primary industry classification.
True if this is the primary event tag.
True if this is the main company the article is about.

uuid.description: Unique Akta identifier for the company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the product. Use this value in the products query parameter to fetch reviews.

categories.description: All categories the product belongs to.

rating.description: Average rating per review provider. Keys are provider identifiers (e.g. g2) and values are floats. Present only when products is provided.

star_distribution.description: Distribution of star ratings per review provider. Keys are provider identifiers (e.g. g2), values are objects keyed by star value (1 through 5) with integer counts. Present only when products is provided.

pros_list.description: Aggregated pros mentioned across reviews. Present only when products is provided.

cons_list.description: Aggregated cons mentioned across reviews. Present only when products is provided.

pricing.description: Pricing information for the product. Present only when products is provided.

reviews.description: Reviews container. Present only when products is provided.

total.description: Total number of reviews available for the product across all providers.

total_by_provider.description: Total review count broken down by provider.

review_title.description: Title of the review as submitted by the reviewer.

review_question_answers.description: Structured question-and-answer pairs from the review.

publish_date.description: Publication date of the review in ISO 8601 format.

review_link.description: Link to the original review on the provider's site.

overall_rating.description: Overall company rating per review provider. Keys are provider identifiers (e.g. glassdoor), values are floats.

type.description: Rating dimension. Example: business_outlook, ceo, recommend_to_friend, compensation_and_benefits, culture_and_values, diversity_and_inclusion, senior_management, work_life_balance.

value.description: Rating value. Sentiment-style dimensions (business_outlook, ceo, recommend_to_friend) are 0 to 1 percentage; other dimensions are 0 to 5 scale.

other_ratings.description: Dimension-level ratings broken out per provider.

total.description: Total number of reviews available for the company across all providers.

total_by_provider.description: Total review count broken down by provider.

rating.description: Overall star rating given by the reviewer.

review_link.description: Link to the original review on the provider's site.

employment_status.description: Employment type of the reviewer. Example: REGULAR, CONTRACT.

is_current_employee.description: True if the reviewer was a current employee at the time of writing.

years_of_employment.description: Reviewer's tenure at the company in years.

country_code.description: Country code of the reviewer's location.

helpful_count.description: Number of users who marked the review as helpful.

not_helpful_count.description: Number of users who marked the review as not helpful.

ceo_rating.description: Reviewer's CEO sentiment. Example: APPROVE, DISAPPROVE.

compensation_and_benefits_rating.description: Reviewer's rating for compensation and benefits.

culture_and_values_rating.description: Reviewer's rating for culture and values.

diversity_and_inclusion_rating.description: Reviewer's rating for diversity and inclusion.

tags.name: News
tags.description: Enriched news articles with AI summaries, sentiment, and company mentions

tags.name: Reviews
tags.description: Product and employee reviews from external sources

get.description:
Fetch enriched news articles for a company or industry. Each article includes AI-generated summary, full text, sentiment, event tags, industry classifications, and resolved company mentions.
Results are returned synchronously — no polling required.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Website domain (e.g. 'https://canva.com') or company UUID returned by the Company Search API.

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Industry name to filter articles by.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD. Non-enterprise plans are limited to a 6-month lookback.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to today.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of news articles to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip before returning records. Use with limit for pagination.

parameters.name: news_score_list
parameters.description: Filter by news score tier. Accepted values: High, Medium, Low, all. Default = all

parameters.name: type_list
parameters.description: Filter by news type. Default = all. See https://playground.akta.pro/news-tags.csv for the list of available news tags.

parameters.name: sentiment_list
parameters.description: Filter by sentiment. Accepted values: positive, negative, neutral, all. Default = all

count.description: Number of articles returned in the data array.

204.description: No content — no articles matched the query.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description:
Resolve a company name, website domain, or UUID into a structured company record.
This is a free endpoint — it does not consume API credits.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A company name, website. The backend automatically resolves the input type. Examples: https://canva.com, canva

204.description: No content — no companies matched the query.

400.description: Bad request — missing or malformed query parameter.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description:
Retrieve structured company data — firmographics, funding, headcount, web traffic, business model, and financials.
Specify which sections you need; only requested sections are returned.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

parameters.name: sections
parameters.description: List of sections to return. If omitted, all sections are returned. Available values: firmographics, gtm_and_business_model, headcount, website_traffic, funding, acquisitions, investments. Note: acquisitions and investments are available on the Enterprise tier only.

data.description: Enriched company data keyed by section name.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient access for requested section.

get.description:
Fetches a company's product catalog and detailed reviews per product including ratings, star distribution, pros, cons, pricing and individual review content.
Results are returned in the API response.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

parameters.name: products
parameters.description: List of product_id values to fetch reviews for. Pass the parameter multiple times to request more than one product. If omitted, the response returns the product list only.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reviews to return per product. Only applies when products is provided.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of reviews to skip before returning records. Use with limit for pagination.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

get.description:
Fetch a company's employee review data including overall ratings, dimension-level ratings (culture, work-life balance, senior management and more) and individual employee reviews.
Results are returned in the API response.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Company website (e.g. 'canva.com') or a company UUID. The UUID can be obtained from the Company Search API.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reviews to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of reviews to skip before returning records. Use with limit for pagination.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.
